claims.quote:
Lastly, all student volunteers must adhere to the Nemours Standards of Behavior and be committed to the Nemours goal of helping children, everywhere, grow into healthy adults.

Requirements

  • Must be TB tested
  • Must be 16 by the start of the program and have completed sophomore year of high school
  • Must be able to speak and understand English
  • Must be willing to learn the skills necessary to be competent in their duties
